title: Shape memory alloy hermetic seal in lithium ion batteries
abstract: A battery cell includes an electrolyte fill hole that is sealed with a shape memory alloy insert. Specifically, the battery cell includes an enclosure having an electrolyte fill hole disposed in a surface of the enclosure housing an electrochemical cell. The battery cell also includes an insert positioned within the electrolyte fill hole. The insert includes a shape memory alloy and has an interference fit with the surface of the enclosure surrounding the electrolyte fill hole to thereby seal the electrolyte fill hole. The battery may comprise a lithium ion battery.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. A battery comprising: an enclosure having an electrolyte fill hole disposed in a surface of the enclosure; an electrochemical cell disposed within the enclosure; and an insert positioned within the electrolyte fill hole, wherein the insert comprises a shape memory alloy and has an interference fit with the surface of the enclosure surrounding the electrolyte fill hole to thereby seal the electrolyte fill hole. 2. The battery of claim 1, wherein the shape memory alloy is a nickel- titanium shape memory alloy. 3. The battery of claim 1, wherein the enclosure is made of aluminum. 4. The battery of claim 1, wherein an outer surface of the insert is positioned directly against the surface of the enclosure. 5. The battery of claim 1, wherein the surface of the enclosure is a surface of a lid of the enclosure. 6. The battery of claim 1, comprising a catch attached to the insert to prevent the insert from falling into an interior of the enclosure. 7. The battery of claim 1, comprising a catch attached to the surface of the enclosure, wherein the catch is configured to prevent the insert from falling into an interior of the enclosure. 8. The battery of claim 1, wherein the insert is tapered along a longitudinal axis of the insert. 9. The battery of claim 1, comprising a polymeric molding component disposed around the insert and between the surface of the enclosure and the insert. 10. The battery of claim 9, wherein the polymeric molding component is a polyimide tape. 11. The battery of claim 1, wherein the insert is a terminal of a lithium ion battery cell. 12. The battery of claim 1, wherein the battery is a lithium ion battery. 13. A vehicle having the battery of claim 1. 14. A battery cell enclosure comprising: a plurality of walls defining an interior volume; an aperture in one of the plurality of walls defining a passage between an exterior of the battery cell enclosure and the interior volume; and a seal comprised of a shape-memory alloy in the aperture which seals the passage. 15. The battery cell enclosure of claim 14, wherein the seal comprises an interference fit in the passage. 16. The battery cell enclosure of claim 15, wherein the seal is a heat-treated interference fit. 17. A method of sealing a battery cell, comprising: positioning an insert within an electrolyte fill hole formed within a surface of a casing of the lithium-ion battery cell, wherein the insert comprises a shape-memory alloy and the insert is positioned in the electrolyte fill hole in a deformed state; applying heat to the insert such that the insert returns to an original state from the deformed state, the original state of the insert being sufficient to cause the insert to be sealed against the surface of the casing via an interference fit. 18. The method of claim 17, comprising providing a polymeric molding component around the insert before positioning the insert in the electrolyte fill hole such that the polymeric molding component remains between the insert and the surface of the casing when the interference fit is produced. 19. A battery produced by the method of claim 17. 20. A lithium ion battery produced by the method of claim 17.
